creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-01-04 05:28:43 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net/nss_ldap         Makefile 
  Log:
  - OPTIONS += LCLASS
  
  Allow the use of login classes in nss_ldap via a new LDAP attribute (loginClass).
  Administrators should be able to add this attribute to their schemata easily.
  
  PR:             ports/14107
  Submitted by:   Jacob Myers <jacob@whotookspaz.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.32      +6 -0      ports/net/nss_ldap/Makefile
